overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a character in a red cloak wading through a flooded post-apocalyptic city at sunset. The character moves slowly through calm water past mangrove trees with exposed roots and ruined concrete structures, with dramatic golden hour lighting creating a silhouette effect against pink and purple clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban street with ruined overpass

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through chest-deep water toward the mangrove trees and distant ruins, creating gentle ripples on the water surface

entered.detail: large collapsed highway overpass with exposed concrete pillars and broken road surface
tall decaying tower structures silhouetted against the sunset sky
large tree with extensive exposed root system growing from the flood water
cluster of smaller mangrove trees with visible root structures

segments.scene_description: The character begins wading through the flooded post-apocalyptic city street, with a massive ruined concrete overpass visible on the left and distant skyscrapers silhouetted against the pink sunset. Mangrove trees with exposed roots dot the calm water ahead as the camera follows steadily from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded area approaching large mangrove tree

events.description: character slightly adjusts heading to navigate around the large mangrove tree on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade forward through the water, approaching the large mangrove tree with prominent exposed roots on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the large mangrove tree, which grows larger in the frame as the distance closes. The ruined overpass recedes into the background on the left while the water ripples gently around the character's movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded ruins beyond the mangrove cluster

events.description: large mangrove tree fills the right side of the frame as the character passes closely by its exposed roots
passing the tree reveals additional ruined structures on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: passing the large mangrove tree and continuing toward the distant ruined towers, wading through the calm reflective water

entered.detail: collapsed building ruins and broken towers emerging from the water on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character passes closely by the large mangrove tree, which temporarily dominates the right side of the frame before receding behind. The scene opens into a wider area of the flooded city with additional ruined structures visible on the right, while the character continues wading toward the distant skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a flooded post-apocalyptic street that gradually opens into a wider vista of ruined urban decay. It begins by trailing a character in a red cloak wading through calm water, with a massive concrete overpass to the left and distant skyscrapers silhouetted against a pink sunset. As the character moves forward, the camera closes the distance toward a large mangrove tree with exposed roots, causing the overpass to recede into the background while gentle ripples disturb the water's surface. The scene then shifts as the character passes closely by the dominating mangrove tree, which slides out of frame to reveal a broader expanse of the flooded city. Finally, the view expands to show additional ruined structures on the right as the character continues their steady journey toward the distant skyline.
